text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've finished the Japan DD,<n>I've figured
out what it is that makes<n>Umamusume so cute and
divine...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's because they're always<n>earnestly chasing
their dreams! I<n>wanna be like that too, so I can
stand<n>next to Opera O and Doto one day!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now I have to get ready to race<n>against King and
the other senior<n>runners in the Mile
Championship!<n>King actually ran in this race last
year<n>too. I can't wait! ☆
